metadata.description: Jobs-To-Be-Done documentation analysis skills for Claude Code. Extract user goals, generate JTBD-oriented TOCs, compare structures, and produce stakeholder reports.

plugins.name: jtbd-analyze
plugins.description: Extract Jobs-To-Be-Done records from markdown documentation

plugins.name: jtbd-analyze-adoc
plugins.description: Extract Jobs-To-Be-Done records from AsciiDoc documentation repos

plugins.name: jtbd-toc
plugins.description: Generate a JTBD-oriented Table of Contents from JTBD records

plugins.name: jtbd-compare
plugins.description: Compare current feature-based structure with proposed JTBD structure

plugins.name: jtbd-consolidate
plugins.description: Generate stakeholder-facing consolidation reports with gap analysis

plugins.name: jtbd-harvest
plugins.description: Harvest technical documentation from a URL for analysis

plugins.name: jtbd-analyze-topicmap
plugins.description: Extract JTBD records from topic map-based OpenShift documentation repos

plugins.name: jtbd-workflow-topicmap
plugins.description: End-to-end JTBD workflow for topic map repos: analyze, TOC, compare, consolidate in one command

plugins.name: jtbd-workflow-adoc
plugins.description: End-to-end JTBD workflow for AsciiDoc repos: analyze, TOC, compare, consolidate in one command
